nasb.text: Stay with me; do not be afraid, for he who seeks my life seeks your life, for you are safe with me.”

esv.text: Stay with me; do not be afraid, for he who seeks my life seeks your life. With me you shall be in safekeeping.”

cnv.text: 你可以住在我這裡。不要懼怕，因為那尋索你命的，正在尋索我的命，你與我在一起就可保安全。”

ccb.text: 你就放心留在我这里，不要害怕，谁想杀你，就是想杀我。你在我这里很安全。”
